articles.headline: Meta ties up with Reliance for first AI-enabled data center in India
articles.summary: Meta’s partnership with Reliance to build its first AI-enabled data center in India signals more local AI infrastructure for one of the world’s largest markets. For businesses, this can affect cloud capacity, latency, and the availability of AI services in India, while also reinforcing capital spending tied to AI demand.

articles.headline: Microsoft launches MXC sandbox for AI agents in Windows enterprise environments
articles.summary: Microsoft’s new OS-level sandbox gives enterprises more secure runtime controls, identity checks, and policy enforcement for AI agents. That is directly relevant for companies trying to deploy agentic AI while limiting security, governance, and compliance risks.

articles.headline: Cuba to lose Visa and Mastercard transactions under U.S. sanctions
articles.summary: Cuba’s loss of Visa and Mastercard transaction access underscores how sanctions can immediately disrupt payment processing and cross-border commerce. The development is most relevant to firms with exposure to sanctions compliance, travel, remittances, or Caribbean trade operations.
